'''tharopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nyas|nyas]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-r-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nyas|nyas]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tharopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thærepeth || thærepej || thærepesh || thærepe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || tharoropoth || tharoropoj || tharoroposh || tharoropo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || tharopoth || tharopoj || tharoposh || tharopo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || tharofpofth || tharofpofj || tharofpofsh || tharofpof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || tharopotho || tharopojo || tharoposho || tharopoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || tharopoth || tharopoj || tharoposh || tharopo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || tharopothol || tharopojol || tharoposhol || tharopokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || tharopoothotho || tharopoojojo || tharopooshosho || tharopooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || tharopothon || tharopojon || tharoposhon || tharopokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || tharopothooro || tharopojooro || tharoposhooro || tharopokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
